title: satureja alpina var. latior
intro: Satureja alpina var. latior, also known as Alpine Savory or Mountain Savory, is a perennial herb belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional folk medicine, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Satureja alpina var. latior include relief from digestive issues, colds, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of Satureja alpina var. latior can be made into teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health concerns.
